resources.string: Alerts you when the app is listening
Alerts you when the app hears a hot word
Click here to return to app.
ZamZam is listening in the background
Click the button to test again.
ZamZam listens for a custom wake word and alerts you with a loud chime the moment it hears it — even when the app is running in the background.
Microphone access is required for wake word detection. Notification permission lets us alert you when the app is backgrounded.

This controls PocketSphinx\'s internal keyword detection threshold. A higher value makes the wake word easier to trigger but increases false positives. A lower value requires clearer speech but is less prone to mishearing. The default works well for most environments — you generally won\'t need to change this.
Do you want to stop the recognizer?
